leadText: Regice (Japanese: レジアイス Regice) is an Ice-type Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation III. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. It is a member of the legendary giants along with Regirock, Registeel, Regieleki, and Regidrago.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Regice is a large, blue Pokémon composed of solid Antarctic ice. Its body is composed of angular crystal-like shapes and its face has an unusual pattern consisting of seven yellow dots in a "+" formation. It has four spikes on its back and its two legs are conical and it balances its entire body on their points. There are three fingers on each of its pentagonal arms. According to legend, Regice was created by the Legendary Pokémon Regigigas using ice from the ice age . It used to be worshipped by humans , but at some point, they started fearing its power and sealed it away. In Hoenn , it was sealed in the Island Cave ; in Sinnoh and Galar , it was sealed in the Iceberg Ruins . Regice moves around by floating in the air. It cloaks itself in air that is −328 °F (−200 °C), and anything near it will become frozen solid. Its deep-frozen body can't be melted, even surviving when submerged in molten lava. It is said that Regice has slept in a glacier for thousands of years.

sections.text: Contents 1 Game data 1.1 NPC appearances 1.1.1 In the core series 1.1.2 In the side series games 1.1.3 In the spin-off games 1.2 Pokédex entries 1.3 Game locations 1.3.1 In side games 1.3.2 In events 1.3.2.1 In-game events 1.4 Stats 1.4.1 Base stats 1.4.2 Pokéathlon stats 1.5 Type effectiveness 1.6 Learnset 1.6.1 By leveling up 1.6.2 By TM 1.6.3 By breeding 1.7 Side game data 1.8 Evolution data 1.9 Sprites Game data [ edit | edit source ] NPC appearances [ edit | edit source ] In the core series [ edit | edit source ] These notable Trainers all use Regice: In Pokémon Emerald , Pyramid King Brandon will use a Regice as part of his team during the Silver Symbol challenge. In all Generation IV games, during a Multi Battle challenge in the Battle Tower , one of the Pokémon that Buck can select to help the player is a Regice. In Pokémon Platinum , HeartGold and SoulSilver , during a Multi Battle challenge in the Battle Tower, one of the Pokémon that Cheryl can select to help the player is a Regice. In all Generation VI games, during the Super Triple Battle challenge in the Battle Maison , Battle Chatelaine Dana will use a Regice as part of her team. In Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl , in the Battle Tower, one of the Pokémon that Candice may use is a Regice. In the side series games [ edit | edit source ] These notable Trainers all use Regice: In Pokémon XD , at Orre Colosseum , Cipher Admin Snattle will use a Regice as part of his team. In Pokémon Battle Revolution , during the Masters Battle Set 7 , Kruger will use a Regice as part of his team. In the spin-off games [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Explorers of Time and Explorers of Darkness : Regice is the boss of Ice Chamber in Aegis Cave . Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] This Pokémon was unavailable prior to Generation III. Generation III Hoenn #194 Kanto #— Ruby Regice 's body was made during an ice age. The deep-frozen body can't be melted, even by fire. This Pok é mon controls frigid air of minus 328 degrees F . Sapphire Regice cloaks itself with frigid air of negative 328 degrees F . Things will freeze solid just by going near this Pok é mon . Its icy body is so cold, it will not melt even if it is immersed in magma. Emerald Its entire body is made of Antarctic ice. After extensive studies, researchers believe the ice was formed during an ice age. FireRed Research revealed that its body is made of the same kind of ice that is found at the South Pole. LeafGreen Generation IV Sinnoh #— Johto #— Diamond Its body is made of ice from the ice age. It controls frigid air of -328 degrees Fahrenheit . Pearl Platinum HeartGold It is said to have slept in a glacier for thousands of years. Its body can't be melted, even by magma. SoulSilver Generation V Unova #— Black Its body is made of ice from the ice age. It controls frigid air of -328 degrees Fahrenheit . White Black 2 Its body is made of ice from the ice age. It controls frigid air of -328 degrees Fahrenheit . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry AG190 Regice May's Pokédex Regice, the Iceberg Pokémon. Formed in the ice age , its body stays at a temperature of minus 328 degrees and cannot be melted, even by fire. Episode Pokémon Source Entry JN071 Regice Goh's Rotom Phone Regice, the Iceberg Pokémon. An Ice type. Its body is covered in air 328 degrees below zero , and it is said to have slept inside glaciers for several thousand years.
